title: elaeagnus angustifolia var. orientalis
intro: Elaeagnus angustifolia var. orientalis, also known as the Russian olive, is a deciduous shrub native to China, Russia, and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Elaeagnus angustifolia var. orientalis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
